content.en:
When his cultivation was promoted to the late stage of the Mandate of Heaven, Ye Tian's cultivation progress slowed down, but he still continued to retreat and began to cultivate the Xuanxu Technique.

Ye Tian's Xuanxu Jue was already the seventh level of the Perfection Realm, and now that his cultivation had broken through, it was much easier to cultivate the Xuanxu Jue, and there were no shackles.

Therefore, soon, Ye Tian's Xuanxuan Jue broke through to the eighth layer entry realm, and his strength increased a lot again.

......

The big universe is very calm, although there are frictions among the major forces, they are basically small contradictions, and no force dares to really fight, after all, they are all afraid of each other.

If it goes on like this, it's not bad.

However, on this day, a group of strong men in black robes came from outside the Great Universe.

They are a notorious force in the chaos - the Dark Temple!

The Dark Temple is mainly based on assassination and robbery, and all kinds of bad things dare to do, and even as long as they give a sufficient price, they even dare to attack and kill a Dao Ancestor.

Throughout the history of the Dark Temple, there were really a few weaker Dao Ancestors who died at their hands.

From this point, it can be seen that the strength of the Dark God Temple is very strong, there is more than one Dao Ancestor, and the number of True Ancestors is even more.

Now, the eyes of the Dark Temple were on the nascent universe.

This time, the Dark God Temple sent ten True Ancestors, and all of them were the top True Ancestors, and together they could even compete with a Dao Ancestor.

Their purpose is simple, to muddy the waters, to make more profit from it, and to kill some geniuses by the way, which is also the favorite thing of the Dark Temple.

The ten True Ancestors of the Dark Temple looked at the Great Universe and began to chat.

"This big universe is too calm, Dao Ancestor's gaze has been shrouded here, these forces don't dare to fight each other at all, we have to muddy the waters. "

"Hehe, if Dao Ancestors can't look at this great universe and can't deduce everything, this great universe will be chaotic. When the time comes, the opportunity for our Dark Temple will come, and we can definitely make a lot of money. Perhaps, there is still hope to seize the place of the ancestral monument!"

"Hurry up, integrate the Dark Dao Stone into this big universe, and then send some elites of the Dark Temple in, and leave after doing this, otherwise we will really be targeted by a powerful Dao Ancestor, and it will not be easy for us to leave!"

"Let's do it!"

The ten True Ancestors joined forces to urge a huge black stone, which exploded with the power of the True Ancestor and merged into the great universe.

In the next moment, a black light instantly enveloped the Great Universe, making the connection between the Great Universe and the outside world instantly weak, and a force blocked the power of the Chaos Dao.

All of a sudden, many True Ancestors and even Dao Ancestors lost their connection with the Great Universe.

Suddenly, these True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors all knew that something had happened in the Great Universe, and they all came across the space with their consciousness.

At this time, the True Ancestors of the Dark Temple had already sent many elites of the Dark Temple into the Great Universe and fled one by one.

Whoa!!

Several Dao Ancestor consciousness incarnations came here, and when they saw the great universe shrouded in black light, they all frowned.

"Dark Temple!"

Several Dao Ancestors said in a low voice.

This black light actually can't really stop them, and it's not very difficult for their consciousness to enter the big universe, but the key is that it's a little more difficult for people in the big universe to contact the outside world.

Moreover, what happened in the big universe, they couldn't figure it out.

They know exactly what that means.

The big universe is going to be in chaos!

Even if their elite were killed, they would have no way of knowing who had done it.

"Careless, I should have known that it was impossible for the Dark Temple to let go of such a big universe, and it should have been blocked all the time!"

A Dao Ancestor repented.

"It's useless to blockade, the power of the Dark Temple is not weak, even Dao Ancestors have some, if they really want to enter the Great Universe, we can't stop it. But fortunately, the Dark God Temple only dares to act secretly, and it is difficult to mobilize too much power to enter the Great Universe, as long as the disciples under the sect are careful!"

"In fact, it's okay to be chaotic, in the competition and fighting, the real strong can be born!"

A Dao Ancestor who liked to kill spoke.

Subsequently, these Dao Ancestors left one by one, but they didn't care too much.

But later, some True Ancestors were in a hurry, they could put a lot of power into the Great Universe, and some True Ancestors even paid a huge price, not to mention bankruptcy, but it was almost there.

If the great universe is in chaos and the strength of their subordinates is wiped out, they don't even know who did it, and they don't even know who to take revenge.

......

within the Great Universe.

Ye Tian quickly got the news that the Great Universe was blocked, and this blocking was difficult to lift, even Dao Ancestor was unwilling to pay such a price.

"Sure enough, the Great God Arithmetic Deduction Technique is okay, but if you want to deduce others, you can't do it, and you can't even deduce the good and evil!" Ye Tian frowned.

According to this situation, this big universe is going to be in chaos.

In the past, everyone may have been afraid of each other's background and did not dare to assassinate and attack, but now there is no need to worry.

"I'm afraid someone will assassinate me!"

Ye Tian pondered.

And this is not a possibility, but a certainty.

He was not so afraid of assassination, but of his family.

Immediately, he spent some points and invited several Heavenly Monarchs who were proficient in formations, and invited them to go to the headquarters of the Terran Heavenly Pavilion to set up formations to protect the safety of some elites of the Terran and his family.

As long as he stayed in the Great Array, it would be difficult for even the top Heavenly Monarch to carry out an assassination.

And Ye Tian paid a great price, but he felt that it was worth it.

Soon after.

In the great universe, the organization of the Dark God Society appeared, which was under the command of the Dark God Temple, and was composed of a group of god generals and heavenly monarchs, among which there were even half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouses.

The Dark God Society has a Chaos Treasure that is proficient in space, and no one knows where the headquarters is, but many forces have been invited by the Dark God Society, anyone can ask them to assassinate people, as long as they can afford the price, they even dare to assassinate half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouses.

In addition, the Dark God Society also robs the resources of ordinary small forces.

In short, the universe is in chaos.

Somewhere in the great universe, a great force sits here.

This force is called the Heavenly Fire Sect, and its strength is not as good as that of the Void Heaven Sect, but it also has a Dao Ancestor.

The strength of the Heavenly Fire Sect in the Great Universe is not weak, with hundreds of Heavenly Monarchs, thousands of Divine Generals, and there are many races that have taken refuge in them, hundreds of millions of living beings are under their rule.

On this day, the Heavenly Fire Sect was plotting something.
